benefits.description: Better weight loss results on combined 5mg Reta + 5mg Tirz than on 15mg Reta alone

protocol_notes: Previously stalled on 15mg Retatrutide. Switched to combination protocol of 5mg Reta + 5mg Tirz with better results. Titrated down from 15mg Reta and adjusted doses weekly. Uses online calculator (joyapp.com/peptides) to manage dosing from various vial strengths. Tracks all peptide administrations with date, time, and dose in online calendar. Adjusts doses gradually as needed.
